同學，我可以喜歡妳嗎？

synopsis: Yeon-U is easily mistaken for a female student due to his soft and delicate appearance. He develops a crush on Hae-Sol Kang, the most popular student in school. However, due to his shy and timid personality, Yeon-U has never spoken to Hae-Sol even once despite being in the same class. (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Zero no Majutsushi: S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita noni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta node Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita @COMIC
titleRomaji: Zero no Majutsushi: S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita noni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta node Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita @COMIC
titleNative: ゼロの魔術師～Sランク勇者パーティを全力でサポートしていたのに追放された最強の魔術師はパーティ恐怖症になったので全力でお一人様無双を始める事にしました～@COMIC
synonyms: Zero Magician: I Was Supporting the S-Rank Hero Party with All My Might. The Strongest Magician Who Was Exiled Developed a Fear of Parties. I Decided to Put All My Effort into Making Each Person Unique.
synopsis: Rude, a magician belonging to an S-rank party, is expelled from the group due to the selfish actions of the hero, Tran. Betrayed by his comrades and heartbroken, Rude abandons the town he had been staying in and sets out on a journey to the neighboring Roland Empire in search of a new home. While on his journey, he defeats a band of thieves attacking a slave caravan. Then, unexpectedly, a beast girl who should have been freed pleads, “Please... I want you to be my master!”...? The strongest mage, abandoned by his comrades, becomes unstoppable in his new home! The Ultimate Heroic Fantasy! (Source: TO Books, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Zero no Majutsushi ~S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita no ni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta no de Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita~

title: Kirishima Gakuen Seitokai Shikkoubu
titleNative: 桐島学園生徒会執行部
synonyms: Kirishima Academy Student Council Executive Board
synopsis: This young adult story is set in the student council of an all-girls school, where the girls work for "freedom and hope." Hiyori Ugaki, a first-year junior high school student, is troubled by a strange man who gets involved with her on the morning train. Hiyori is supposed to like school, but recently she has been feeling uneasy about leaving her house. When she puts her concerns in the student council's suggestion box, an unexpected person helps her out... (Source: natalie.mu, translated)

title: Agnes Kamen
synonyms: Agunesu Kamen
synopsis: Professional wrestler Yamamoto Jingo just returned to Japan from a 5 year training trip in the US and Mexico, only to be greeted by his now defunct wrestling company: Yamato. He's come to find out that as soon as the president of the company passed away, the rival wrestling group "Teijitsu" took down Yamato. Jingo has now been forced to go seek revenge for the destruction of Yamato by challenging the Teijitsu president. One thing led to another, and now Jingo has been half-forced into working under Teijitsu as the new wrestler from Brazil: Agnes Kamen. (Source: MangaHelpers)

tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Megami no Daikousha to Natta Shounen, Banjou no Ou to Naru
titleRomaji: Megami no Daikousha to Natta Shounen, Banjou no Ou to Naru
titleNative: 女神の代行者となった少年、盤上の王となる
synonyms: The Boy Who Became the Goddess's Proxy Rises as the King on the Board.
synopsis: Luca, whose homeland was destroyed by a powerful curse, ended up bearing the curse himself. Determined not to let anyone else suffer the same misfortune, he sets out to uncover the curse's true nature by becoming a top-tier adventurer. Along the way, he meets the goddess Selimys and decides to become her "Proxy" (follower). Thus begins an adventure fantasy where a boy, now a servant of the goddess, races through a world entangled in divine conspiracies alongside his comrades! (Source: Futabasha, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Megami no Daikousha to Natta Shounen, Banjou no Ou to Naru

title: Vampire Knight
titleNative: ヴァンパイア騎士 (ナイト)
synopsis: Cross Academy is attended by two groups of students, the Day Class and the Night Class. At twilight, when the students of the Day Class return to their dorm, they cross paths with the Night Class on their way to school. Yuki Cross and Zero Kiryu are the Guardi

title: Studio Cabana
synopsis: Yukari Maki, a diligent high school girl. One day, she spots her classmate, Yusuke Kusaka, who was rumored to be a delinquent, singing a love song. Never having imagined such a sweet, yet sad, singing voice could come from him, Yukari was instantly captivated—without knowing that it would soon be the beginning of a sad, unrequited love.

title: Your Meteor, Hidden in Flowers
titleNative: 花秘める君のメテオール
synonyms: 君掩花間流星將至
Ton étoile filante cachante le fleurs
synopsis: Every hundred years, the Monster’s Bride is chosen — a sacrifice given to the demonic creature confined somewhere within the country. When Stella’s sister is chosen, she volunteers to go in her place. Stella is soon sent to be the bride of the blood-soaked vampire Lavi. But behind the blood and fangs, Stella finds this monster harbors a deep loneliness. Will her affections pull him out of his deadly despair, or is their love cursed from the start? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Nukozuke!
synonyms: Nukoduke! Diary of raising strange animals
เรื่องวุ่นๆกับมนุษย์เหมียวๆ
synopsis: A pocket-sized cat-human: have you met a Nuko? In a world where these curious creatures evolved from ordinary cats, part-timer Yuya finds two abandoned nukos on the side of the road and brings them home out of the rain. Kei needs his ducks to be in a row, while Sasame charms everyone she meets. Yuya’s got the cooking and sewing skills to take care of these adorable new housemates, but when he’s the one falling asleep in any warm spot of sunlight, who’s really taking care of who?! Kick back and let this human, his nukos, and their ameowsing life warm your heart! Included chapters: 24.5 (Source: One Peace Books)

One day while on the way to school, she has an encounter with "The Spirit of the Chest, Aurelia de Medici," and thereafter finds herself thrown headfirst into a no-holds-barred otherworldly battle revolving around money.

一番遠くて、近いあいつ。～君に恋をするなんて、ありえないはずだった～
synopsis: Yasutaka Iijima, a boy wearing glasses, sits in the corner of the classroom and wants nothing to do with Ema Kitaoka, a popular gal in the same class. However, after a chance meeting at the school camping trip, they started talking with each other, but only outside of school. They are both unsure of each other's "true feelings." (Source: Comic Howl, translated)

title: Kyou Kara Tsukaeru Isekai Renai Manual
titleRomaji: Kyou Kara Tsukaeru Isekai Renai Manual
titleNative: 今日から使える異世界恋愛マニュアル
synonyms: A Love Manual You Can Use From Today
synopsis: Just as Haruchika Isezaki was confessing to his first love, he is suddenly summoned to another world. His summoner, the goddess Clementine, gives him an unusual mission: to make seven girls, destined to become the mothers of the next generation of heroes, fall in love again. These girls have lost their ability to love due to a curse cast by the Demon Lord. In other words, Haruchika must convince them all to fall in love with him! To return to his world and hear the answer to his confession, Haruchika accepts this mission and sets out to save another world through love. Having mastered the art of romance through his study of female psychology, his journey to fulfill their first loves begins — a romantic tale about saving another world through the power of love! (Source: Nico Nico Seiga, translated)

title: Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume: Reburn!!
synonyms: Scorching Ping Pong Girls Reburn!!
synopsis: Koyori is a new transfer student looking for excitement, and Agari is a girl who devotes herself to her sport. Their encounter will create a fiery whirlwind in the world of junior high table tennis! Will Koyori and her team be able to grab a ticket to the nationals at the Tokyo tournament? Hearts pounding! Love at full speed! The story about girls' youth, previous adapted into anime, has been rekindled! (Source: Takeshobo, translated) Note: A sequel to Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume , originally announced in a special chapter called Shakunetsu no Idol Musume on February 24th 2023.

title: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleRomaji: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleNative: 隣国から来た嫁が可愛すぎてどうしよう。
synonyms: My Wife from the Neighboring Country Is So Cute, I Don't Know What to Do!
鄰國來的新娘太可愛了該怎麼辦？
synopsis: With his brash personality and muscular physique, and his fierce presence fighting against his country's foes, Salyu is known as the “Winter Bear of Tidros." Until one day when he finds himself engaged to Citron, a young lady whose betrothal was broken off in a neighboring country! Starting with a kiss on the forehead, he fidgets awkwardly around this unfamiliar woman. Her smile makes his heart race, and glimpses of her cleavage leave him flustered. Salyu's mind runs wild with naughty thoughts, pushing his sanity to the brink! This chaotic, heart-pounding romantic fantasy comedy begins — with his inner thoughts coming through loud and clear! (Source: Comic Pash, translated)

As the villainess Yvonne, she was supposed to be hated by the readers, as she bullies the FMC and helps the main characters come together. title: Yuuyuu Jiteki.
synonyms: Play Play As You Please.
synopsis: Chihiro Suzuki, a serious and reserved college boy, meets Miyu Washio, an older girl with an incredibly positive attitude, while working at a convenience store near his new home. “Let’s make some happy memories right now!” Her unpredictable ideas for “fun” — and her wholehearted enjoyment of the moment — gradually transforms his dull and uneventful daily life. From their slightly offbeat conversations, an unexpected new chapter in their lives begins. This is a sweet and fresh coming-of-age romantic comedy that starts with “friendship”! (Source: NicoNico Seiga, translated)

titleNative: 竜と歩む成り上がり冒険者道 ~用済みとしてSランクパーティから追放された回復魔術師、捨てられた先で最強の神竜を復活させてしまう~
synopsis: Dion, a healer, was thrown into the deepest part of a dungeon in a plot by his fellow party member. As he was facing certain death, he found a wounded dragon there. Dion healed the dragon with the last of his strength, and it turned out that it's a divine dragon named Eldora. Now that Eldora has regained her power, she will join Dion the exiled healer on a journey together as adventurers. Meanwhile, Yuki, the leader of the party that ditched Dion, was searching for him alone....... (Source: Bunkasha, translated)
